name: Easy Chocolate Frosted Peanut Butter Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two 8 or 9-inch round cake pans.
3. In a large bowl, blend the cake mix, vanilla pudding, 1/2 cup peanut butter, milk, and eggs until moistened.
4. Beat for 2 minutes at highest speed.
5. Fold in 1/2 cup chopped peanuts.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool cake in pans for 5 minutes, then remove to racks to cool.
8. Blend frosting with 1/4 cup peanut butter.
9. Frost the cooled cake and sprinkle with remaining chopped peanuts.
